title: Vertical 9:16 Hyper Realistic Editorial Food

imagePrompts.prompt: Vertical 9:16 hyper-realistic editorial food infographic of an Indonesian dish. A traditional bowl of steaming hot Indonesian food sits at the bottom of the frame on a rustic wooden surface. Above it, the ingredients rise upward in a realistic gravity-defying stack: juicy meat, crispy tofu, glossy sauce splashes, fresh herbs, red chilies, lime wedges, garlic, and fried shallots. Keep a clean vertical composition with a strong visual hierarchy, bowl at the base and floating ingredients ascending. Add tasteful infographic overlays with clear Indonesian text labels and thin white pointing lines. Professional food-magazine layout, warm cinematic studio lighting, dramatic steam, motion-frozen ingredients, shallow depth of field, sharp DSLR-style focus, ultra-detailed textures, premium editorial realism, no watermark, no logo.
